name: graph-schema-json-js-utils
description: Monorepo for Graph Schema JSON Utils

scripts.test:ci: npm run build && npm run test && npm run test:integration
scripts.docker:start-neo4j: docker run --name neo4j-test -p 7687:7687 -e NEO4J_AUTH=neo4j/password -e NEO4J_ACCEPT_LICENSE_AGREEMENT=yes neo4j:enterprise
scripts.docker:stop-neo4j: docker stop neo4j-test && docker rm neo4j-test
